subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to follow up after the conference — I'm glad you reached out to get something formal on the calendar.

Here are three slots that work on our end for a 30-minute call:

  • Tuesday, 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Wednesday, 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Thursday, 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00 UTC

Let me know which works best for you and I'll get an invite sent over.

On the request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering: I'm not in a position to share individual internal contact information. For the right point of contact, please refer to our public website. Once we've had our initial call, I'll make sure the appropriate senior stakeholders are brought in from our side.

Looking forward to it!

Best regards
